description: Etapa 1: Upload de extrato CSV do Mercado Pago via admin panel. Criar migration, funcao de ingestao, endpoints API e aba React.

userStories.title: Migration extrato_uploads
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the extrato_uploads table in Supabase to store upload history.
acceptanceCriteria: File migrations/007_extrato_uploads.sql created with schema: id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, seller_slug TEXT NOT NULL, filename TEXT, month_ref TEXT, status TEXT DEFAULT 'processing', total_lines INT DEFAULT 0, new_inserted INT DEFAULT 0, duplicates_skipped INT DEFAULT 0, errors INT DEFAULT 0, summary_json JSONB, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ
Migration applied to Supabase via mcp__supabase__apply_migration
Verification: SELECT * FROM extrato_uploads LIMIT 1 returns no error
python3 -m pytest passes (152+ tests)
userStories.notes: Read rfcs/plano-execucao/01-upload-extrato.md section 3 for full schema. Check existing migrations in migrations/ for naming convention.

userStories.title: Public ingest_extrato_from_csv function
userStories.description: As a system, I need a public function in extrato_ingester.py that accepts CSV text directly and runs the existing ingestion pipeline without downloading from ML API.
acceptanceCriteria: Function ingest_extrato_from_csv(seller_slug: str, csv_text: str) -> dict added to app/services/extrato_ingester.py
Function reuses existing internal functions: _parse_account_statement(), _classify_extrato_line(), _resolve_check_payments(), and the full dedup/upsert logic
Returns dict with keys: total_lines, new_inserted, duplicates_skipped, errors, summary (dict by expense_type)
Function is async and follows same patterns as ingest_extrato_for_seller()
Does NOT modify behavior of existing ingest_extrato_for_seller() function
python3 -m pytest passes (152+ tests)
userStories.notes: Read app/services/extrato_ingester.py fully. The existing ingest_extrato_for_seller() downloads CSV from ML API then processes. The new function skips the download and enters the pipeline at the parse stage. Key internal functions to reuse: _parse_account_statement() (line ~250), _classify_extrato_line() (line ~335), _resolve_check_payments() (line ~370). The CSV format is Account Statement (5 columns: DATE, DESCRIPTION, REFERENCE_ID, TRANSACTION_NET_AMOUNT, BALANCE in Portuguese).

userStories.title: Upload endpoint POST /admin/extrato/upload
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to upload an extrato CSV file via the API so that gap lines are ingested into mp_expenses.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /admin/extrato/upload endpoint added to app/routers/admin/extrato.py
Accepts multipart form with fields: file (UploadFile CSV) and seller_slug (str)
Validates seller exists via get_seller_config()
Validates file is parseable CSV (calls _parse_account_statement, catches errors)
Calls ingest_extrato_from_csv() and persists result in extrato_uploads table
Returns JSON: {upload_id, seller_slug, status, total_lines, new_inserted, duplicates_skipped, errors}
Protected by require_admin dependency
python3 -m pytest passes
userStories.notes: Read app/routers/admin/extrato.py for existing extrato endpoints pattern. Read app/routers/admin/_deps.py for require_admin. The endpoint should handle encoding detection (UTF-8 or Latin-1). Use FastAPI UploadFile for file handling.

userStories.title: History endpoint GET /admin/extrato/uploads/{seller_slug}
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to see the history of extrato uploads for a seller.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /admin/extrato/uploads/{seller_slug} endpoint added to app/routers/admin/extrato.py
Returns list of uploads ordered by created_at desc
Accepts limit (default 20) and offset (default 0) query params
Protected by require_admin dependency
Response shape: {seller, count, data: [{id, filename, month_ref, status, total_lines, new_inserted, duplicates_skipped, errors, created_at, completed_at}]}
python3 -m pytest passes
userStories.notes: Simple Supabase query on extrato_uploads table. Follow pattern from expenses/crud.py list_expenses endpoint.

userStories.title: React ExtratoTab component in admin panel
userStories.description: As an admin, I want an Extratos tab in the admin panel to upload CSVs and see upload history per seller.
acceptanceCriteria: New ExtratoTab component created in dashboard/src/components/admin/
Tab added to AdminPanel navigation alongside existing tabs
Upload section: seller dropdown + file input + submit button
Shows upload result after submission (new_inserted, duplicates_skipped, errors)
History table: lists previous uploads per seller with status and metrics
Loading state during upload
Error handling for invalid files and failed uploads
cd dashboard && npm run build compiles without errors
userStories.notes: Read dashboard/claude.md for frontend conventions. Read dashboard/src/components/admin/ for existing tab patterns. Use CSS Modules (no Tailwind). The admin panel uses X-Admin-Token header for auth. API base URL from existing config. Sellers list can be fetched from GET /admin/sellers.
